author: y4rr
content: Phase 6 dispatch (#1004) movement 1 surfaced this. ConvNeXt-T currently has 5 divergences from torchvision convnext_tiny: (1) [closing in #997] regular 7×7 conv vs depthwise (groups=C). (2) Missing layer_scale per-block parameter (γ shape [C,1,1]). (3) pwconv1/pwconv2 in torchvision are nn.Linear operating on [B,H,W,C], ferrotorch uses Conv2d 1×1. (4) Naming scheme: ferrotorch block<i>.layer<j>.{dwconv,norm,pwconv1,pwconv2} vs torchvision features.<i>.<j>.block.{0,2,3,5}. (5) Classifier head naming ferrotorch head_{norm,fc} vs torchvision classifier.{0,2}. (6) Stem bias=false vs torchvision bias=True. (7) Stem norm key features.0.1 vs ferrotorch stem_norm.
